name: Em ElectroMate Water Dispenser with Hot and Normal White Water Dispenser WD01
description:
Key Features:

Hot & Normal Water Options – Dispense water at the perfect temperature for drinking or cooking.
Efficient Heating System – Provides hot water instantly for tea, coffee, and soups.
User-Friendly Design – Simple push-button operation for hassle-free use.
Durable & Stylish Build – Sleek and sturdy design complements any home or office space.
Compact & Space-Saving – Ideal for kitchens, offices, and shared spaces.
Energy-Efficient Performance – Designed to save power while maintaining optimal water temperature.
The ElectroMate Water Dispenser is a must-have for homes and workplaces, offering easy access to hot and normal water anytime.

 

Order now and experience convenience at your fingertips!

name: Vision TowerSpeaker 240W Sound System VP2060TS
description:
Experience premium audio with the Vision Plus Tower Speaker 240W, a handcrafted wooden sound system delivering powerful 240W output through dual subwoofers, midrange drivers, and tweeters, with versatile connectivity options including Bluetooth, USB, AUX, and HDMI for an immersive entertainment experience.

Output Power: 240W (Max Power)
Warranty: 2 Years
Body: Hand-made wooden cabinet for powerful bass and elegant design.
Height: 62CM
Speaker (SUB): 6.5” X2
Speaker (MID): 3” X2
Speaker (TWEETERS): 1″ X2
Features: BT/USB/ AUX/ LED DISPLAY/ HDMI/ REMOTE
FM Radio: Yes
Dimensions: W160XH620XD300mm
